name: 7'10"x10' Tonal Outdoor Rug Green - Threshold™
description:
Bring your entryway or outdoor seating space to life with the Tonal Outdoor Rug from Threshold™. Featuring a woven dual-color tonal design over a solid background, this rectangular outdoor rug coordinates with a variety of decor styles while adding a pop of color to your space. Ideal for placing on your patio or in your entryway, you can also place this decorative outdoor rug in your three-season porch to protect your floors from spills and stains.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
